D1.arithmeticExplanation: The member is not a Finding IV welfare-discount member; no discount operator enters its estimate.

D2.arithmeticExplanation: The member has no Marshallian welfare vector to which distribution weights can apply.

D3.arithmeticExplanation: The member estimates a complete statutory 30-year path, not an OM tail share.

D4.arithmeticExplanation: The member contains no private/public Marshallian-surplus numerator-denominator pair.

D5.arithmetic: executed concentration-shadow frequency paired with this member adverse bound

D1.arithmeticExplanation: The member is not a Finding IV welfare-discount member; no discount operator enters its estimate.

D2.arithmeticExplanation: The member has no Marshallian welfare vector to which distribution weights can apply.

D1.arithmetic: sum(private marginal value - public counterfactual marginal value), discount factor fixed to one

D2.arithmetic: sum(discounted net marginal value × baseline mean canonical consumption / projected canonical consumption), the logarithmic marginal-consumption weight

D3.arithmetic: discounted deposited beyond-horizon value / (absolute controlling OM + discounted beyond-horizon value)

D4.arithmetic: published as the required numerator/denominator pair; no quotient is computed

D5.arithmetic: paired executed Finding III frequency upper bound and this member OM lower bound
